headline: Dow Jones Futures Fall; Micron Skid Despite Blowout Earnings, Oil Prices Hit $100
summary: Futures dipped as U.S. oil prices hit $100 while Micron fell despite blowout earnings. The Dow Jones and S&P 500 undercut recent lows on cautious Powell comments.

headline: Micron revenue almost triples, tops estimates as demand for memory soars
summary: Micron's stock has soared this year while its tech peers have struggled, as the impact of rising memory costs ripples across the industry.

headline: Why Lumentum Is A Buy Despite The Run-Up
summary: Lumentum (LITE) surged after unveiling advanced AI data center networking solutions at OFC 2026, including a 1.6T DR4 OSFP transceiver and high-power lasers.

headline: 3 Reasons We Love Lam Research (LRCX)
summary: What a time it’s been for Lam Research. In the past six months alone, the company’s stock price has increased by a massive 79.9%, reaching $227.21 per share. This was partly due to its solid quarterly results, and the performance may have investors wondering how to approach the situation.

This was partly due to its solid quarterly results, and the performance may have investors wondering how to approach the situation.

headline: How The Lam Research (LRCX) Investment Story Is Shifting With New Analyst Expectations
summary: Lam Research’s updated fair value estimate now sits at about US$274.90, compared with roughly US$274.42 previously, reflecting a very modest shift in the price target embedded in recent models. Research desks linking this change to a stronger wafer fab equipment spending backdrop, improving DRAM and NAND expectations, and inclusion on preferred idea lists are helping shape how that new number is framed for investors. Read on to see how to track these moves and make sense of the evolving...

headline: 3 Growth ETFs to Buy in 2026 and Hold Until Your Portfolio Hits 7 Figures
summary: Building a seven-figure portfolio from scratch requires one thing above almost everything else: time in the market, compounded through funds that systematically own the companies driving the economy forward. Growth ETFs are the most direct vehicle for that. They screen specifically for companies with above-average earnings and revenue expansion, filtering out the slow-movers that drag ... 3 Growth ETFs to Buy in 2026 and Hold Until Your Portfolio Hits 7 Figures

headline: Ethisphere Recognizes Lam Research as One of the World's Most Ethical Companies® for Fourth Consecutive Year
summary: Lam Research Corp. (Nasdaq: LRCX) today announced that it has been recognized as one of the 2026 World's Most Ethical Companies® by Ethisphere, a global leader in defining and advancing the standards of ethical business practices. This is the fourth consecutive year that Lam has received the award, which honors organizations committed to business integrity through robust ethics, compliance, and governance programs.
